spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for cards to provide breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: shadow-sm for interactive elements. Default to flat with 1px border-border.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Tri-pane layout for results.

components_instructions.cards: Flat solid surfaces. 1px subtle border. No glassmorphism (prevent data refraction).
components_instructions.buttons: Primary: bg-[#2E5C4F] text-white hover:bg-[#23473D]. Fully rounded-full or rounded-xl.
components_instructions.inputs: Shadcn default with rounded-xl and ring-[#2E5C4F] on focus.
components_instructions.tabs: Shadcn custom. h-auto, clear active state with high contrast.
components_instructions.grad_cam_viewer: Tri-pane or side-by-side comparison. Left: Original. Right: Heatmap overlay. Use an opacity slider if possible. Accent color #E07A5F for heat signatures.
components_instructions.fusion_model_display: Highlight this section visually. Make it span full width (col-span-full) or sit prominently below the baseline models. Use the Primary color to denote the definitive Fusion score.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text over heatmap images has text-shadow or a dark overlay underneath for readability.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Subtle fade-ins for dashboard elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. E.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='upload-eye-input', data-testid='risk-level-card'

icons.style: Clean, stroke-based, consistent weight (2px). Use for medical indicators, warnings, and UI actions.

image_urls.description: Minimalist medical examination room for the background of the educational section or about page.
Quiet hospital corridor, can be used blurred as a placeholder or empty state background.

media.guidelines: Use authentic medical imagery. Do not use generic cartoons. Keep image borders rounded-2xl to match the UI.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind config with the provided color palette and fonts (Outfit for headings, Manrope for body).
The project uses .js and .jsx files, NOT .tsx files. Write all React components in pure JavaScript (.js/.jsx) and configure Tailwind accordingly.
For the Results Dashboard, implement a Bento Grid layout: Eye Model, Nail Model, Fusion Model.
The Grad-CAM viewer is a hero feature. Ensure it scales beautifully on mobile and desktop. Provide a clear overlay of the AI's attention region.
Ensure the risk level cards (Low/Moderate/High) use the specific background and text colors defined in the colors object.
All form inputs and buttons MUST include a valid data-testid attribute.
Do NOT use glassmorphism for medical data cards. Use flat white surfaces with a 1px border (#E5E5E5) for clinical clarity.
For educational content, use generous line-height (leading-relaxed) and left-aligned text for readability.
Implement JWT Auth flows seamlessly using Shadcn Forms/Inputs.
